hero.subtitle: Bridging the gap between bulletproof stability and rapid innovation. I engineer systems that don't just work — they excel under pressure.

autoTesting.title: QA Automation & Screenplay
autoTesting.desc: Designing scalable automation frameworks for the banking sector (Grupo Aval & SQA), applying the Screenplay pattern with Java and Serenity BDD for clean, maintainable suites.

bankingCore.title: Core Banking & Transactions
bankingCore.desc: Specialized in financial transaction validation, ensuring the integrity of ISO 8583 messaging, Postilion, and Base24 payment gateways.

apiTesting.title: API & Integration Testing
apiTesting.desc: Designing and executing comprehensive REST and SOAP web services tests using Postman and SoapUI to guarantee security in financial systems.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Web Development
fullstack.desc: Building modular applications integrating React, Vue3, and Tailwind with robust backends like Node.js, Express, and databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase).

bot.title: Banking QA Framework
bot.desc: An enterprise-grade automation framework built for financial core systems, integrating Serenity BDD and Java for strict transactional verification.

testSuite.title: ISO 8583 Transaction Simulator
testSuite.desc: A custom utility for simulating and validating Base24 financial messages and payment gateway interactions prior to production deployment.

portfolio.title: Nursing Lab ChatBot
portfolio.desc: A conversational web application built with React and Express for managing laboratory reservations and equipment check-outs.

contact.desc: I'm currently seeking impactful roles where technical precision meets creative problem solving. Let's build something reliable.
